hyperedges.label: Ask AI modal vertical layout stack
Lesson content hierarchy: title → section → example → interactive questions

nodes.label: Arc1 AI Tutor Rework Roadmap
nodes.rationale: 2026-07-09 tutor-only plan: Phases -1 through 3 shipped; superseded by arc2 then v3 launch roadmap.

nodes.label: Arc2 Universal Roadmap
nodes.rationale: Tiers 0-3 shipped and owner-gated 2026-07-10; Tier 4 dopamine deferred; history only — do not execute.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 0 — Conversation Core
nodes.rationale: Fixes P1-P5: client rewire to /tutor, markdown pipeline, phone-first chat UI, context-flow pass; shipped 2026-07-10.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 1 — Tutor Experience
nodes.rationale: SSE streaming, teacher agent_settings, six student personalities; owner tone-gates passed per prompt-notes.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 2 — Product Completeness
nodes.rationale: Real Profile page, login UX cleanup, page polish sweep; all 15 pages real.

nodes.label: Arc2 Tier 3 — Hardening & Ops
nodes.rationale: CORS allowlist, users/status lockdown, auth rate limit, account status enforcement, model defaults gemini-3.5-flash.

nodes.label: Tier 0.A Client Rewire
nodes.rationale: Replace questionFeedbackApi with tutorApi; retire /ask /feedback /write-evaluate; intent-aware persona kills P1 greeting-as-answer bug.

nodes.label: Tier 1.A SSE Streaming
nodes.rationale: stream:true → text/event-stream with token/suggestions/done/error; createSuggestionsGate hides [SUGGESTIONS] from tokens; fetch not axios.

nodes.label: Content.agent_settings
nodes.rationale: Per-lesson teacher controls: persona_note, allow_direct_answers, scope, custom_guidelines; injected below Golden Rules in persona.

nodes.label: Student Tutor Personalities
nodes.rationale: Six presets in personality.ts; tutorPersonality.store; localStorage for anonymous; synced to StudentMemory.tutor_personality when logged in.

nodes.label: Phase -1 Test Harness
nodes.rationale: Vitest+supertest+mongodb-memory-server; app.ts/index.ts split; characterization tests before SDK migration; shipped 2026-07-10.

nodes.label: POST /api/chat/tutor (Arc1 Phase 1)
nodes.rationale: Introduced unified tutor with lessonContext, ChatSession, four modes; legacy endpoints kept until Phase 5 then deleted in arc2 Tier 0.

nodes.label: CORS_ORIGINS Allowlist
nodes.rationale: Env-driven origin allowlist; fails open with boot warning when unset so misconfigured Render does not brick students.

nodes.label: Hot Potato
nodes.rationale: AI-powered learning platform for Thai students far from good schools; teachers author lessons with critical-thinking questions; students freely chat with Gemini tutor.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 1: Never Ration Tokens
nodes.rationale: No per-student quotas or paywalls; rate limiting exists only to stop bots with generous env-tunable thresholds.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 2: Anonymous Full Access
nodes.rationale: Logged-out users read public content and use AI fully; only persistence differs; never add protect to AI or public-content read paths.

nodes.label: graphify-out Knowledge Graph
nodes.rationale: Prebuilt codebase map (1231 nodes, 97 communities); query for structure, verify recent files directly.

nodes.label: Launch-Readiness Roadmap v3
nodes.rationale: Tiers 0-6: SEO, observability, bundle split, settings/profile, CI, launch, deferred backlog; nothing deployed until Tier 5.

nodes.label: POST /api/chat/tutor
nodes.rationale: Unified AI endpoint with SSE streaming, 4 modes, suggestions; server owns lesson context.

nodes.label: lessonContext.service.ts
nodes.rationale: Server serializes full lesson text and teacher questions; client never ships lesson content to AI.

nodes.label: optionalAuth Middleware
nodes.rationale: Enforces Golden Rule 2 on AI and public content read paths.

nodes.label: Three-Repo Workspace Layout
nodes.rationale: Hot-Potato meta repo for docs; client/ and server/ are separate product repos gitignored in meta.

nodes.label: Documentation Intuition Layer
nodes.rationale: Explains how flows work and why; graphify is skeleton, CLAUDE.md is reference, asking-flow.md is the template bar.

nodes.label: asking-flow.md Quality Bar
nodes.rationale: Only true end-to-end intuition doc; every Tier D1 flow doc should match predict-the-prompt quality.

nodes.label: Guide Tutorial Track (G0-G6)
nodes.rationale: Hub plus learning-showcase and creating-showcase with Playwright-generated screenshots; scene-by-scene not interactive tour.

nodes.label: learning-showcase (/guide/learning)
nodes.rationale: 9-scene anonymous-first student walkthrough for low-tech phone users.

nodes.label: creating-showcase (/guide/creating)
nodes.rationale: 10-scene teacher walkthrough; desktop editor screenshots; teaches /create not /dashboard.

nodes.label: BRAND_NAME (brand.ts)
nodes.rationale: Working name Hot Potato; one-line rename for guide copy and UI chrome.

nodes.label: Tier 0: SEO and Link Previews
nodes.rationale: Site-wide OG tags only; per-lesson OG needs SSR parked as Tier 6.D.

nodes.label: Tier 1: Observability
nodes.rationale: In-memory error ring buffer plus passive AI health on GET /api/status/all; no paid SaaS.

nodes.label: Tier 2: Bundle Split and Fonts
nodes.rationale: React.lazy routes cut entry to ~137 kB gzip; self-host fonts for bad-connectivity students.

nodes.label: Tier 3: Settings and Profile
nodes.rationale: Cut dead settings rows; app-wide font size; tutor memory UI on profile.

nodes.label: Tier 3.5: Teacher AI Helper
nodes.rationale: POST /api/creator/assist copilot for low-tech teachers; preview-accept never auto-apply; teacher-only protect.

nodes.label: POST /api/creator/assist
nodes.rationale: 11 creator actions mirroring tutor pattern; JSON validated server-side; never raw TipTap JSON.

nodes.label: Preview to Accept Pattern
nodes.rationale: AI output enters document only via normal editor transaction after teacher accepts; autosave untouched.

nodes.label: Owner Decision D1: Deploy Last
nodes.rationale: No pushes until Tier 5; one deploy pass at end.

nodes.label: Tutor Mode: followup
nodes.rationale: Raw message without feedback tag; why greetings are not graded.

nodes.label: FEEDBACK_TASK_TAG Evaluation Gate
nodes.rationale: AI evaluates only messages prefixed with [งานของเธอตอนนี้: ให้ฟีดแบ็กคำตอบของเพื่อน].

nodes.label: appearance.store (Font Size)
nodes.rationale: App-wide rem scaling via documentElement.style.fontSize; separate from viewer CSS zoom.

nodes.label: Teacher AI Helper Vision
nodes.rationale: Low-tech Thai teachers need AI for formulas, proofread, questions, critic; became Tier 3.5.

nodes.label: onboarding โ€” Clone to Working AI
nodes.norm_label: onboarding โ€” clone to working ai

nodes.label: Two-Tier Web App (React SPA + Express API)
nodes.norm_label: two-tier web app (react spa + express api)

nodes.label: TipTap Document as Single Source of Truth
nodes.rationale: One serialization path gives autosave, undo, and viewer everything for free; Fabric syncs via saveState bridge.
nodes.norm_label: tiptap document as single source of truth

nodes.label: Server Owns Lesson Context
nodes.rationale: Lesson is trusted server data; prevents prompt injection and centralizes what the AI sees.

nodes.label: Golden Rule 2 โ€” Anonymous Full Access
nodes.rationale: Login adds persistence only; AI and public reads use optionalAuth never protect.
nodes.norm_label: golden rule 2 โ€” anonymous full access

nodes.label: Golden Rule 1 โ€” Never Ration Tokens
nodes.rationale: Rate limits are bot-only with generous env-tunable thresholds; per-surface buckets.
nodes.norm_label: golden rule 1 โ€” never ration tokens

nodes.label: AI Writes via Preview then Accept
nodes.rationale: Teacher copilot never auto-writes; prose as markdown, blocks as validated typed JSON.
nodes.norm_label: ai writes via preview then accept

nodes.label: ADR-003 TipTap Single Source of Truth
nodes.norm_label: adr-003 tiptap single source of truth

nodes.label: ADR-008 Font Size vs Viewer Zoom
nodes.norm_label: adr-008 font size vs viewer zoom

nodes.label: Entry Bundle Size Budget
nodes.rationale: Students on bad connections must not download the teacher editor; ~138 kB gzip entry after splitting.

nodes.label: Guard Matrix
nodes.rationale: Open by default; optionalAuth on AI and public reads; protect on account and authoring.

nodes.label: Intuition Documentation Layer
nodes.rationale: Answers how the system works end-to-end and why; complements knowledge graph and CLAUDE.md reference.
